LAW AND MOTION 302, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONVERTED TO A MOTION TO STAY. THE COURT, ON ITS OWN MOTION, TREATS DEFENDANTS COLLEEN COEN, OLIVER GUTIERREZ'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, AS TO ALL FOUR CAUSES OF ACTION IN THE COMPLAINT, AS A MOTION TO STAY THIS CASE PENDING THE COMPLETION OF THE FAMILY LAW CASE CURRENTLY PENDING IN SAN MATEO COUNTY AND GRANTS THE MOTION TO STAY. THIS CASE IS STAYED UNTIL THE CONCLUSION OF RAGO V. RAGO, SAN MATEO SUPERIOR COURT NO. F0119845. SEE MINUTES AND/OR TRANSCRIPT FOR DETAILS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR NO. 8189, EMAIL: CKAREN@SFTC.ORG; DEPT. 302.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-07-2017 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-07-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John F. Henning III, of Henning & Wallace, Tel. 415.519.0975, for defendants;
No other appearances.

Ruling: A R G U E D. On its own motion, the Court treats DEFENDANTS COLLEEN COEN, OLIVER GUTIERREZ's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, as to all four causes of action in the complaint filed by plaintiff Robert Rago, as a motion to stay this case pending the completion of the family law case currently pending in San Mateo County and GRANTS the motion to stay. This case is stayed until the conclusion of Rago v. Rago, San Mateo Superior Court No. F0119845. All issues raised in this case can and should be raised in the San Mateo case. The alleged misconduct supporting all four causes of action allegedly occurred in the San Mateo case and the alleged damages result from rulings in that case. Unless this case is stayed, there is a significant risk of inconsistent rulings. Finally, judicial economy strongly supports not having two cases pending relating to the same issues at the same time in adjacent counties. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
